Audio in this folder is selected from Kenney CC0 packs:

- Sci-Fi Sounds 1.0: https://opengameart.org/content/sci-fi-sounds
- RPG Sounds: https://opengameart.org/content/rpg-audio

License: Creative Commons Zero (CC0).

Gunshot sounds are trimmed/compressed from Vincent Sevedge's Gunshot Sounds:

- Gunshot Sounds: https://opengameart.org/content/gunshot-sounds
- Source files: `sounds/cz.wav` for pistol, `sounds/sks.wav` for rifle

License: Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 Unported.
